signals.headline: MicroStrategy Becomes Largest Single Bitcoin Holder | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
MicroStrategy Becomes Largest Single Bitcoin Holder | YES | MED confidence**

MicroStrategy has just surpassed IBIT (iShares Bitcoin ETF) as the largest single holder of Bitcoin.[4] Additionally, prominent analyst Tom Lee continues supporting Ethereum with a $100,000 purchase.[4]
